verdicts.note: The dossier verifies candidacy and a voter-directed campaign posture but supplies no professional or public-service profile. Absence of a documented record is not affirmative evidence of the rubric's outsider or renewal pole.

review_notes: All 6 original candidate-axis pairs were reviewed exactly once (1 refuted, 5 upheld). No additional omitted axis had sufficiently specific dossier support.
